current_description: Changed name from Membership_Percentage to better reflect the data. This is the attendancevalue to use for a student for a day based on the Conversion_Mode_CD, FTEID and Input_Valuespecified (and Day Part ID, if day part processing is enabled). This value is a real number andtypically, but not necessarily, reflects a fraction of 1 where 1 is a full attendance value. Used inconjunction with ADA to aggregate attendance.

current_description: 1.0 if the student was absent, 0.0 if present. Derived as abs(attendancevalue - 1).
